description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 3 hrs 48 mins coding, with a daily average of 55 mins. His time was mostly in Markdown and Python, with some SQL and other language usage. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117.
